title: Random Entity Textures
description: This 1.12.2 mod randomizes resourcepack mob textures like OptiFine.
body:
Mobs can now be given random textures from your resourcepack folder without OptiFine. This mod is compatible with resourcepacks that have random mob textures which required it previously.

**Requirements:** [MixinBooter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixin-booter)

**How to set up:**

Send textured variants of a mob of your choosing to the resourcepack directory like this -


```
minecraft/resourcepacks/your-resourcepack/assets/minecraft/optifine/mob/zombie/zombie1.png
minecraft/resourcepacks/your-resourcepack/assets/minecraft/optifine/mob/zombie/zombie2.png
minecraft/resourcepacks/your-resourcepack/assets/minecraft/optifine/mob/zombie/zombie1121.png
minecraft/resourcepacks/your-resourcepack/assets/minecraft/optifine/mob/pig/pig2.png
```


![random textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ead767c952833639b12cbe6c4e9e8cc410c8436.png)
